title: CVE-2026-3964 - OpenAkita Chat API Endpoint shell.py run os command injection

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-3964 - OpenAkita Chat API Endpoint shell.py run os 
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/13
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*shell.py*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
